violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to indicate which menu items are available raw or undercooked. PIC added indicating symbols to menu during time of inspection until menus are reprinted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

A leak was observed in the dry storage room. Food items were observed stored beneath the leakage. No sign of contamination was observed and food items were during time of inspection. Establishment is to refrain from storing food items in areas of potential contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both 2-door reach-in units and the downstairs 1-door reach-in freezer. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. Drain on prep sink was observed to be an air break. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025
